summary: M2.5 (Claude startup file generation): Template existed at templates/CLAUDE.template.md. Patched bootstrap and adopt scripts to render it into downstream .claude/CLAUDE.md. Documented generation flow in META_SPEC.md. Scaffold's own CLAUDE.md unchanged. Code-reviewer approved with non-blocking suggestions (sed escaping, dedup template block, OPTIONAL_REFERENCES placeholder).
changes: Added generation flow docs to docs/META_SPEC.md
Clarified OPTIONAL_REFERENCES placeholder scope in docs
reviewer_notes: Non-blocking: sed replacement not safe for special chars in PROJECT_NAME (unlikely with basename)
Non-blocking: duplicated template-rendering block across bootstrap/adopt scripts
Non-blocking: OPTIONAL_REFERENCES always blanked (profile-driven population deferred)
suggested_commit_message: meta-M2.5: approve Claude startup file generation
